title: ligustrum retusum
intro: Ligustrum retusum, also known as the Japanese privet, is a shrub or small tree native to East Asia, belonging to the olive family (Oleaceae). Traditionally, Ligustrum retusum has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving circulation, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. Ligustrum retusum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
